title: tribulus maximus var. adscendens
intro: Tribulus maximus var. adscendens, also known as Puncture Vine or Goat's Head, is a climbing vine plant native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, primarily due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tribulus maximus var. adscendens include improving cardiovascular health, enhancing fertility, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Tribulus maximus var. adscendens is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or supplements, although its preparation and dosage should be guided by a healthcare professional.
